mapper.insert: insert into feed ( username, feed_content, like_cnt, reply_cnt, created_at, edited_at, deleted ) values ( #{username}, #{feedContent}, #{likeCnt}, #{replyCnt}, NOW(), NOW(), #{deleted} )
mapper.select: select f.feed_id, f.username, f.feed_content, f.like_cnt, f.reply_cnt, f.created_at, ff.saved_name, ff.file_path from feed f join feed_file ff on f.feed_id = ff.feed_id join feed_tag t on f.feed_id = t.feed_id where deleted=0 order by f.created_at desc
